name: vietnamese-emotion-recognition
description: End-to-end Vietnamese social media emotion recognition platform.

scripts.build: npm --workspace @emotion-recognition/shared run build && npm --workspace @emotion-recognition/api run build && npm --workspace @emotion-recognition/web run build
scripts.lint: npm --workspace @emotion-recognition/shared run lint && npm --workspace @emotion-recognition/api run lint && npm --workspace @emotion-recognition/web run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace @emotion-recognition/shared run typecheck && npm --workspace @emotion-recognition/api run typecheck && npm --workspace @emotion-recognition/web run typecheck
scripts.test: npm --workspace @emotion-recognition/shared run test --if-present && npm --workspace @emotion-recognition/api run test --if-present && npm --workspace @emotion-recognition/web run test --if-present
